name: Avocado, Tomato and Mushroom Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 Tomatoes (hot-house or beefsteak) OR 4 Plum tomatoes
2 Avocados; cut in half, seed removed, peeled
12 medium Shiitake mushroom caps (if using dried mushroom caps, soak to reconstitute)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the tomatoes and peeled avocados from stem to tip and fan on plates.
2. Just before serving, heat the olive oil in a medium skillet over medium heat.
3. Add the mushrooms and cook, covered, for 5 minutes.
4. Add the garlic, shallots, vinegar, and salt. Cook, covered, for 1 minute more.
5. Remove the mushrooms and arrange over the avocado and tomato.
6. Give a few turns of the peppermill over each salad as desired.
7. Distribute the dressing equally on the salads.
